data.content: Planning revised after reproducing current behavior. `src/knot_id.rs` and `src/app.rs` already use last-hyphen splitting, existing unit coverage includes a hyphenated prefix, and manual named-project verification with active project `feature-builder` produced correct results (`created 92e7`, stored id `feature-builder-92e7`, `kno ls` shows `92e7`). Recommended implementation path is reproduce-first: add a focused regression in `tests/cli_named_projects.rs`, only change production code if that test exposes an actual first-hyphen split site, and otherwise update the knot with the real failing scenario before coding.
